name: Muse Spark 1.1
description: Muse Spark 1.1 is a multimodal reasoning model from Meta Superintelligence Labs built for agentic tasks, with improvements in tool and computer use, coding, long-context work, and multimodal understanding. It supports a 1 million token context window and is available through the Meta Model API public preview.

details.name: context_window
details.other_info: Meta says Muse Spark 1.1 can actively manage a 1 million token context window.

details.name: api_status
details.other_info: Meta announced public preview access through the Meta Model API.
